narrative:
Gorham / Fayette (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,358 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
